story.title: Best Homemade Pizza Dough Recipe | How To Make Pizza Crust
story.logline: A home baker demonstrates step-by-step how to make pizza dough from scratch, answering if this method can deliver perfect crust on the first try, weaving in hydration, kneading, proofing, gluten.
story.setting: a clean kitchen prep counter with flour, yeast, and mixing tools
story.conflict_tension: Can this to make method deliver the intended result on the first try?
story.visual_hook: Hands preparing the key ingredient that defines how to make pizza dough.
story.ending_beat: proofing, bake, and final texture takeaway.
story.style_direction: premium documentary realism instructional demo for vertical 9:16 YouTube Shorts. Purpose: teach how to make pizza dough step by step with clear hands-on detail. Camera: handheld-inspired stability with observational framing. Lighting: natural motivated available light with soft contrast.

continuity_anchors.location: a clean kitchen prep counter with flour, yeast, and mixing tools
continuity_anchors.lighting: natural motivated available light with soft contrast
continuity_anchors.palette: neutral documentary color grade with selective warmth

clip_beats: Show all ingredients clearly with hydration ratio explained; prep the mixing bowl with flour, yeast, salt, and water ready.
Demonstrate kneading technique focusing on gluten development; shape dough into a ball and cover for rest.
Show proofing process with dough rising; bake in oven and reveal final crust texture and tips for best results.
